MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp. is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kiesha Lambino is present.
Attorney Lilian Maher representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Oct-01-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
